title: roettlera cinerea
intro: Roettlera cinerea, also known as the dusty rose or red velvet bean, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is a climber with a high concentration of ergine, a psychoactive alkaloid, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Roettlera cinerea include pain relief, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be beneficial for treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds. Roettlera cinerea can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its health benefits, which include reducing stress, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression.
